title: Solvent Extraction of Molybdenum(VI) with Malachite Green into Nitrobenzene
author: Z. R. TUREL
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Nuclear Chemistry Division, The Institute of Science, 15 Madam Cama Road, Bombay-400 032 

  Manuscript received 26 May 1994, revised 7 November 1994, accepted 1 February 1995  

 A rapid and selective method has been developed for the extraction of Mo VI  with malachite green into nitrobenzene. The effects of various parameters on the extraction coefficient value, such as effect of pH, time of equilibration, solvents, effect of various anions and cations have been evaluated. The stoichiometry of metal to reagent determined by the method of substoichiometric extraction is found to be 1 : 1; it is further supported by the slope-ratio method.

The stoichiometry of metal to reagent determined by the method of substoichiometric extraction is found to be 1 : 1; it is further supported by the slope-ratio method.
